requirement_topic.en: CODINORM Standards Context and IEC 61851 Technical Basis
requirement_topic.zh: CODINORM 标准环境与 IEC 61851 技术依据
requirement_topic.zht: CODINORM 標準環境與 IEC 61851 技術依據

summary.en: Cote d'Ivoire's national standards context should be checked through CODINORM and the project owner before shipment. For EV conductive charging equipment, IEC 61851 is the internationally recognized technical family for EV conductive charging systems and is commonly used as the project basis where a local charger-specific rule is not published or where tenders require IEC compliance.
summary.zh: 出货前应通过 CODINORM 和项目业主核实科特迪瓦国家标准环境。对于电动汽车传导式充电设备，IEC 61851 是电动汽车传导充电系统的国际通用技术标准族；在未公布本地充电设备专门规则或招标要求 IEC 合规时，通常作为项目技术依据。
summary.zht: 出貨前應通過 CODINORM 和項目業主核實象牙海岸國家標準環境。對於電動汽車傳導式充電設備，IEC 61851 是電動汽車傳導充電系統的國際通用技術標準族；在未公布本地充電設備專門規則或招標要求 IEC 合規時，通常作為項目技術依據。

standards_or_laws: CODINORM national standards catalogue and conformity context

summary.en: China-market chargers commonly rely on GB/T 18487.1 and related GB/T standards for conductive charging. Those reports may help map safety, control-pilot, protection, and communication clauses, but they do not prove CODINORM adoption, tender acceptance, customs acceptance, or site approval in Cote d'Ivoire.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电设备通常依据 GB/T 18487.1 及相关 GB/T 标准管理传导充电。这些报告可用于映射安全、控制导引、保护和通信条款，但不能证明已获 CODINORM 采标、招标接受、海关接受或科特迪瓦现场批准。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電設備通常依據 GB/T 18487.1 及相關 GB/T 標準管理傳導充電。這些報告可用於映射安全、控制導引、保護和通信條款，但不能證明已獲 CODINORM 採標、招標接受、海關接受或象牙海岸現場批准。

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851 crosswalk and identify which clauses are covered by existing GB/T reports and which require IEC-route retesting on the export configuration. Confirm with CODINORM, the importer, and the project owner whether IEC 61851 is mandatory by law, tender, contract, or local acceptance route.
gap.zh: 应准备 IEC 61851 对照表，说明现有 GB/T 报告覆盖哪些条款、出口配置还需按 IEC 路径补测哪些条款。并向 CODINORM、进口商和项目业主确认 IEC 61851 是由法律、招标、合同还是本地接受路径强制要求。
gap.zht: 應準備 IEC 61851 對照表，說明現有 GB/T 報告覆蓋哪些條款、出口配置還需按 IEC 路徑補測哪些條款。並向 CODINORM、進口商和項目業主確認 IEC 61851 是由法律、招標、合同還是本地接受路徑強制要求。

mandatory_status.target: Honest status: not confirmed as a blanket statutory whole-unit charger certificate; may become mandatory through CODINORM adoption, tender specifications, customs conformity route, utility acceptance, or project-owner requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 is the China-market technical baseline for conductive EV charging systems; it is not a Cote d'Ivoire approval route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 61851 as the technical baseline for a Cote d'Ivoire export file unless CODINORM or the tender specifies otherwise. Do not present China GB/T 18487 reports as a local approval without a clause-by-clause mapping and local confirmation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非 CODINORM 或招标文件另有规定，应将 IEC 61851 作为科特迪瓦出口文件的技术基线。未进行逐条映射并取得本地确认前，不应将中国 GB/T 18487 报告表述为当地批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非 CODINORM 或招標文件另有規定，應將 IEC 61851 作為象牙海岸出口文件的技術基線。未進行逐條映射並取得本地確認前，不應將中國 GB/T 18487 報告表述為當地批准。
